menu_dia: Menu of the day (1 Water, bread and dessert) 16.50€
pan_picos: Table service, bread and olives 1.50€ per person.
org_msg1: Organization and gastronomy are our passion.
org_msg2: We make your event a unique experience.
org_msg3: “We have the freshly made buffet or menu ideal for any type of event and taste. Whether it’s corporate celebrations, weddings, birthdays or any other type of event, your wishes as a customer will always come first. Our team has extensive experience that guarantees high-quality products as well as perfect presentation. All our dishes are homemade and cooked specifically for your event. If you wish, you can try the dishes or menus you want, you just need to make an appointment.“
